title: Interleaver design for multi-slot uplink shared channel transmission
abstract: Various aspects of the present disclosure generally relate to wireless communication. In some aspects, a user equipment (UE) may select, for a communication on a multi-slot transmission occasion, coded bits of a plurality of coded bits on a per slot basis, for each of multiple slots of the multi-slot transmission occasion. The UE may interleave the coded bits on a per slot basis to form one or more interleaved encoded bit sequences of a codeblock. The UE may transmit the communication including the one or more interleaved encoded bit sequences. Numerous other aspects are provided.
